/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/lt.dir/src/Main.cpp.o -o /home/rhague/Documents/Code_Projects/ltheory-test/bin/lt64r  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rhague/Documents/Code_Projects/ltheory-test/bin:/home/rhague/Documents/Code_Projects/ltheory-test/libphx/ext/lib/linux64 /home/rhague/Documents/Code_Projects/ltheory-test/bin/libphx64r.so -lGL -lGLEW -ldl -lSDL2 -lfreetype -lluajit-5.1 -llz4 /home/rhague/Documents/Code_Projects/ltheory-test/libphx/ext/lib/linux64/libfmod.so /home/rhague/Documents/Code_Projects/ltheory-test/libphx/ext/lib/linux64/libfmodstudio.so -lBulletCollision -lBulletDynamics -lLinearMath
